system.description: The embodiment of destiny. Perhaps solemn. Perhaps far more mischievous.
system.title: God of Destiny

scriptures.name: Level 1: Prophecy
scriptures.description: You get sharp visions of future events. Roll a Wis dice pool and count the successes. You can spend each success to add either an Advantage or Disadvantage to any roll for the rest of the encounter. You can spend no more than your level in the god on any one roll.

scriptures.name: Level 2: Tragic Fate
scriptures.description: Ranged attack, single target, medium range. Give a vivid psychic vision of an awful fate. In addition to damage, target suffers a Disadvantage on all actions for the encounter from existential horror. Once per target per encounter.

specials.name: You know what the vision was

scriptures.name: Level 3: Avatar of Destiny
scriptures.description: Commit yourself to the web of fate. For the encounter, your every action is what must happen. If your Wis is higher than your Dex, your maximum Guard equals your Wis and you set it to full. All your attacks gain:

specials.name: Suffer calamity, fall to zero Health
